name: crush_skill
description: Relationship Persona Simulation Engine — 5-layer personality, nonlinear state dynamics, LLM-powered dialogue analysis, multi-format chat import. Build a 'digital twin' of someone from chat history and interact with them realistically.
author: Crush.skill contributors

config.description: Mode parameters for quick_start/custom_sandbox/chat_import. Supports: archetype, name, gender, age, mbti, attachment_style, relationship_stage, and persona (for custom_sandbox: full 5-layer persona object)

source_text.description: Chat records or relationship description text for import

source_text_file.description: Path to file containing chat records

variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
variables.description: API key for LLM-powered dialogue analysis (optional, falls back to local analysis)
